title: Chicken Biryani
description: Traditional spicy chicken biryani recipe
steps: Begin by carefully washing all fresh produce. Mince the garlic and dice any large vegetables, ensuring the rice is cut into even, bite-sized pieces for consistent cooking.
Place a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat and add 2 tablespoons of cooking oil, swirling to coat the bottom of the pan.
Once the oil is shimmering and hot, carefully add the rice and sear for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally until nicely browned.
Reduce the heat to medium. Incorporate the chicken, spices, onions, and oil into the skillet, tossing everything together to ensure the flavors mix well.
Continue to cook the mixture for an additional 45 mins, stirring frequently to prevent sticking or burning.
Remove the chicken biryani from the heat. Let it rest for 2 to 3 minutes before portioning into plates or bowls. Serve hot and enjoy your meal!

title: Pizza
description: Cheesy homemade pizza recipe
steps: Begin by carefully washing all fresh produce. Mince the garlic and dice any large vegetables, ensuring the flour is cut into even, bite-sized pieces for consistent cooking.
Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C) and lightly grease a baking dish or tray with olive oil or butter.
Arrange the flour and cheese, tomato sauce, and vegetables evenly across the prepared baking dish.
Place the dish on the center rack of the oven and bake undisturbed for 25 mins, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the pizza from the heat. Let it rest for 2 to 3 minutes before portioning into plates or bowls. Serve hot and enjoy your meal!

Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C) and lightly grease a baking dish or tray with olive oil or butter.
Arrange the turkey and black pepper, garlic, paprika, quinoa, sugar, bread, and butter evenly across the prepared baking dish.
Place the dish on the center rack of the oven and bake undisturbed for 15 mins, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the bbq turkey casserole from the heat. Let it rest for 2 to 3 minutes before portioning into plates or bowls. Serve hot and enjoy your meal!

title: BBQ Chicken Stir Fry
description: A delicious and easy to make bbq chicken stir fry, perfect for a quick meal.
steps: Begin by carefully washing all fresh produce. Mince the garlic and dice any large vegetables, ensuring the chicken is cut into even, bite-sized pieces for consistent cooking.
Place a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat and add 2 tablespoons of cooking oil, swirling to coat the bottom of the pan.
Once the oil is shimmering and hot, carefully add the chicken and sear for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally until nicely browned.
Reduce the heat to medium. Incorporate the garlic, basil, corn, and butter into the skillet, tossing everything together to ensure the flavors mix well.
Continue to cook the mixture for an additional 10 mins, stirring frequently to prevent sticking or burning.
Remove the bbq chicken stir fry from the heat. Let it rest for 2 to 3 minutes before portioning into plates or bowls. Serve hot and enjoy your meal!

title: Spicy Beef Salad
description: A delicious and easy to make spicy beef salad, perfect for a quick meal.
steps: Begin by carefully washing all fresh produce. Mince the garlic and dice any large vegetables, ensuring the beef is cut into even, bite-sized pieces for consistent cooking.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the beef with honey, chicken broth, pasta, potatoes, black pepper, and salt.
Toss the ingredients thoroughly to ensure everything is evenly coated.
Cover the mixture and let it chill in the refrigerator for 15 mins to allow the flavors to meld together.
Remove the spicy beef salad from the heat. Let it rest for 2 to 3 minutes before portioning into plates or bowls. Serve hot and enjoy your meal!

title: BBQ Shrimp Soup
description: A delicious and easy to make bbq shrimp soup, perfect for a quick meal.
steps: Begin by carefully washing all fresh produce. Mince the garlic and dice any large vegetables, ensuring the shrimp is cut into even, bite-sized pieces for consistent cooking.
Place a large, heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat and add a splash of oil or a knob of butter.
Add the shrimp and sauté gently for 5 minutes until it begins to brown. Then, stir in the heavy cream, pasta, coriander, bread, parmesan cheese, and paprika.
Pour in enough broth or water to cover the ingredients, bring the mixture to a rolling boil, then reduce the heat to low. Cover the pot and let it simmer gently for 45 mins.
Remove the bbq shrimp soup from the heat. Let it rest for 2 to 3 minutes before portioning into plates or bowls. Serve hot and enjoy your meal!

title: Crispy Tofu Pasta
description: A delicious and easy to make crispy tofu pasta, perfect for a quick meal.
steps: Begin by carefully washing all fresh produce. Mince the garlic and dice any large vegetables, ensuring the tofu is cut into even, bite-sized pieces for consistent cooking.
